fato_historico: 1968: Intel is founded in Mountain View, California.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos hums with the spirit of innovation today. Just as a new foundation for the future was once laid in a quiet office, you may find that your ideas are sparking with unexpected brilliance. It is a good time to build something lasting, trust your expanding horizon, and let your adventurous spirit lead the way toward new creative summits.
frase_do_dia: Great things begin with a single spark of daring imagination.
significado_numero: Represents the awakening of your true path and inner wisdom.
conselho: Consider planting the seeds for a dream you have long ignored today.
